name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Brockley
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Execute '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, logs, or screenshots if available.

## Environment

- **Brockley version**: (e.g., v0.1.0 or commit hash)
- **Deployment method**: (Docker Compose / Helm / binary)
- **OS**: (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14)
- **Go version** (if building from source): (e.g., 1.25.0)
- **Browser** (if UI issue): (e.g., Chrome 120)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem. Relevant configuration, graph definitions, or provider settings.
